mapper.select:
SELECT c.cart_id, c.user_id, c.product_id, c.option_id, c.quantity, c.created_at,
p.seller_id, s.company_name AS seller_name,
p.name AS name,
p.price, p.sale_price, p.sale_start_at, p.sale_end_at, p.delivery_fee,
p.free_shipping, p.stock, p.image_l AS image_l, p.status,
po.option_name, IFNULL(po.option_price, 0) AS option_price, po.option_stock,
(p.price + IFNULL(po.option_price, 0)) * c.quantity AS origin_total,
CASE WHEN p.sale_price > 0 AND p.sale_price < p.price AND ( ( p.sale_start_at IS NULL AND p.sale_end_at IS NULL ) OR ( p.sale_start_at IS NOT NULL AND p.sale_end_at IS NOT NULL AND CURDATE() BETWEEN DATE(p.sale_start_at) AND DATE(p.sale_end_at) ) ) THEN p.sale_price + IFNULL(po.option_price, 0) ELSE p.price + IFNULL(po.option_price, 0) END AS item_price,
CASE WHEN p.sale_price > 0 AND p.sale_price < p.price AND ( ( p.sale_start_at IS NULL AND p.sale_end_at IS NULL ) OR ( p.sale_start_at IS NOT NULL AND p.sale_end_at IS NOT NULL AND CURDATE() BETWEEN DATE(p.sale_start_at) AND DATE(p.sale_end_at) ) ) THEN (p.sale_price + IFNULL(po.option_price, 0)) * c.quantity ELSE (p.price + IFNULL(po.option_price, 0)) * c.quantity END AS item_total,
CASE WHEN p.sale_price > 0 AND p.sale_price < p.price AND ( ( p.sale_start_at IS NULL AND p.sale_end_at IS NULL ) OR ( p.sale_start_at IS NOT NULL AND p.sale_end_at IS NOT NULL AND CURDATE() BETWEEN DATE(p.sale_start_at) AND DATE(p.sale_end_at) ) ) THEN (p.price - p.sale_price) * c.quantity ELSE 0 END AS discount_total,
CASE WHEN p.sale_price > 0 AND p.sale_price < p.price AND ( ( p.sale_start_at IS NULL AND p.sale_end_at IS NULL ) OR ( p.sale_start_at IS NOT NULL AND p.sale_end_at IS NOT NULL AND CURDATE() BETWEEN DATE(p.sale_start_at) AND DATE(p.sale_end_at) ) ) THEN FLOOR((p.price - p.sale_price) / p.price * 100) ELSE 0 END AS sale_rate
FROM cart_items c JOIN products p ON c.product_id = p.product_id JOIN sellers s ON p.seller_id = s.seller_id LEFT JOIN product_options po ON c.option_id = po.option_id
WHERE c.user_id = #{value} AND p.status = 'APPROVED'
ORDER BY p.seller_id ASC, c.product_id ASC, c.cart_id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cart_items ( user_id, product_id, option_id, quantity ) VALUES ( #{user_id}, #{product_id}, #{option_id}, #{quantity} )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cart_items c JOIN products p ON c.product_id = p.product_id WHERE c.user_id = #{value} AND p.status = 'APPROVED'

SELECT c.cart_id, c.user_id, c.product_id, c.option_id, c.quantity,
p.seller_id, s.company_name AS seller_name,
p.name,
p.price, p.sale_price, p.sale_start_at, p.sale_end_at, p.delivery_fee,
p.free_shipping, p.stock, p.image_l,
po.option_name, IFNULL(po.option_price, 0) AS option_price, po.option_stock,
(p.price + IFNULL(po.option_price, 0)) * c.quantity AS origin_total,
CASE WHEN p.sale_price > 0 AND p.sale_price < p.price AND ( ( p.sale_start_at IS NULL AND p.sale_end_at IS NULL ) OR ( p.sale_start_at IS NOT NULL AND p.sale_end_at IS NOT NULL AND CURDATE() BETWEEN DATE(p.sale_start_at) AND DATE(p.sale_end_at) ) ) THEN p.sale_price + IFNULL(po.option_price, 0) ELSE p.price + IFNULL(po.option_price, 0) END AS item_price,
CASE WHEN p.sale_price > 0 AND p.sale_price < p.price AND ( ( p.sale_start_at IS NULL AND p.sale_end_at IS NULL ) OR ( p.sale_start_at IS NOT NULL AND p.sale_end_at IS NOT NULL AND CURDATE() BETWEEN DATE(p.sale_start_at) AND DATE(p.sale_end_at) ) ) THEN (p.sale_price + IFNULL(po.option_price, 0)) * c.quantity ELSE (p.price + IFNULL(po.option_price, 0)) * c.quantity END AS item_total,
CASE WHEN p.sale_price > 0 AND p.sale_price < p.price AND ( ( p.sale_start_at IS NULL AND p.sale_end_at IS NULL ) OR ( p.sale_start_at IS NOT NULL AND p.sale_end_at IS NOT NULL AND CURDATE() BETWEEN DATE(p.sale_start_at) AND DATE(p.sale_end_at) ) ) THEN (p.price - p.sale_price) * c.quantity ELSE 0 END AS discount_total,
CASE WHEN p.sale_price > 0 AND p.sale_price < p.price AND ( ( p.sale_start_at IS NULL AND p.sale_end_at IS NULL ) OR ( p.sale_start_at IS NOT NULL AND p.sale_end_at IS NOT NULL AND CURDATE() BETWEEN DATE(p.sale_start_at) AND DATE(p.sale_end_at) ) ) THEN FLOOR((p.price - p.sale_price) / p.price * 100) ELSE 0 END AS sale_rate
FROM cart_items c JOIN products p ON c.product_id = p.product_id JOIN sellers s ON p.seller_id = s.seller_id LEFT JOIN product_options po ON c.option_id = po.option_id
WHERE c.user_id = #{user_id} AND p.status = 'APPROVED' AND c.cart_id IN
#{id}
ORDER BY p.seller_id ASC, c.cart_id DESC
